productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Black & White Printed Dress
description: Style Note This black dress, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this fabulous dress. Style this with understated accessories and heeled shoes. Product Details Black and white sleeveless dress with a round neck, slightly pleated on the chest with an elasticated waist Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
